channel.title: AIツール分析 — 最新アップデート
channel.description: 生成AI・AIエージェントの最新アップデートを随時配信。新機能・料金変更・連携情報など。

item.title: GitHub: Read remote repository content with GitHub CLI
item.description: Explore repository content from your terminal without cloning by using two new commands: gh repo read-file and gh repo read-dir. What you can do Use gh repo read-file to read… The post Read remote repository content with GitHub CLI appeared first on The GitHub Blog.

item.title: GitHub: Secret scanning updates – June 2026
item.description: Since our last pattern update, we’ve expanded secret scanning’s detection coverage with new partners, more patterns blocked by push protection by default, additional validity checks, and richer metadata for leaked… The post Secret scanning updates – June 2026 appeared first o

item.title: GitHub: Enterprise-managed settings now support bypass permission controls
item.description: We’re adding our first governance capability to the enterprise-managed settings configuration. Enterprise administrators can now set disableBypassPermissionsMode to "disable" in the enterprise-managed settings.json to prevent GitHub Copilot CLI and VS… The post Enterprise-managed setting

item.title: GitHub: Auto mode in Copilot Chat available for all users
item.description: GitHub Copilot auto model selection is now generally available in Copilot Chat on github.com and the GitHub mobile app for all Copilot plans. With auto, Copilot chooses a model on… The post Auto mode in Copilot Chat available for all users appeared first on The GitHub Blog.

item.title: GitHub: Limit open pull requests for users without write access
item.description: Maintainers of open source repositories are dealing with an ever-growing volume of pull requests, including repeated low-quality or drive-by contributions that can slow triage and overwhelm review queues. To help… The post Limit open pull requests for users without write access appeared first

item.title: Google AI: New research shows how AMIE, our medical AI, could help manage health conditions.
item.description: Research in “Nature” shows our conversational AI system matches primary care physicians in complex disease management.

item.title: OpenAI: A near-autonomous AI chemist improves a challenging reaction in medicinal chemistry
item.description: OpenAI and Molecule.one show how a near-autonomous AI chemist using GPT-5.4 improved a key drug-making reaction, advancing medicinal chemistry research.

item.title: OpenAI: Introducing LifeSciBench
item.description: Introducing LifeSciBench, an expert-authored, expert-reviewed benchmark for evaluating how AI systems handle real-world life science research tasks and decisions.

item.title: OpenAI: Predicting model behavior before release by simulating deployment
item.description: OpenAI introduces Deployment Simulation, a method to predict AI model behavior before deployment using real conversation data to improve safety and evaluation accuracy.

item.title: Google AI: We’re strengthening our presence in Alabama through new investments and community support.
item.description: Google has announced a $1.5 billion investment for 2026 and 2027 to expand its data center campus in Jackson County, Alabama. Operating since 2019 on a repurposed former…
